name: Chocolate Banana Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chocolate, 60 mL of the evaporated milk, and sugar replacement in the top of a double boiler.
2. Chill remaining milk in the freezer.
3. Cook and stir over simmering water until chocolate melts.
4. Pour hot chocolate mixture into egg yolks and beat well.
5. Add egg mixture to chocolate mixture on top of the double boiler.
6. Stir in salt.
7. Cook and stir over hot water until the mixture thickens.
8. Cool completely.
9. Scrape cold or slightly frozen milk into a mixing bowl and beat until very stiff.
10. Fold the chocolate mixture into the stiffly beaten milk.
11. Add vanilla extract and banana slices.
12. Spoon into molds, freezer tray, or individual cups and freeze until firm.
Exchange 1 serving: 1 bread slice, 1 fat Calorie for 1 serving: 69
